description:
Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.3 Docker image with a before_script that runs `bundle install` and defines the variables JEKYLL_ENV=production and LC_ALL=C.UTF-8. Define two stages: test and deploy. Add a test job that runs in the test stage, executes `bundle exec jekyll build -s web -d test`, stores the `test` directory as an artifact, and runs on all branches except master. Add a pages job that runs in the deploy stage, only on the master branch, runs the following commands in order: `cp ENTITATS_PARTICIPANTS.md web/_includes/entitats.md`, `cp la_guia/README.md web/_includes/que_es.md`, `sed -z 's/

\*/
*/g' la_guia/ESTRATEGIES.md | sed -z 's/

\([[:digit:]]\)/
\1/g' > web/_includes/estrategies.md`, `cp COM_CONTRIBUIR.md web/_includes/com_contribuir.md`, `sed -z 's/

\*/
*/g' locale/es/ESTRATEGIES.md | sed -z 's/

\([[:digit:]]\)/
\1/g' > web/_includes/estrategies-es.md`, `sed -z 's/

\*/
*/g' locale/en/ESTRATEGIES.md | sed -z 's/

\([[:digit:]]\)/
\1/g' > web/_includes/estrategies-en.md`, `sed -z 's/

\*/
*/g' la_guia/ESTRATEGIES_AUTONOMIQUES.md | sed -z 's/

\([[:digit:]]\)/
\1/g' > web/_includes/estrategies-autonomiques.md`, `bundle exec jekyll build -s web -d public`, and `mv public/.well-known/acme-challenge/X__w03qTHoQuZvPAtYkDrfcm4XR5kIZmcbKeccAr44E.html public/.well-known/acme-challenge/X__w03qTHoQuZvPAtYkDrfcm4XR5kIZmcbKeccAr44E`, then publishes the `public` directory as a pages artifact.
